about_raw.value: Founded in 1861, MIT is a private land-grant research university in Cambridge, Massachusetts, USA. It is currently ranked #1 globally by QS World University Rankings 2024.
about_raw.raw_snippet: Founded in 1861, MIT is a private land-grant research university in Cambridge, Massachusetts, USA.

tuition_raw.value: Undergraduate: $62,396 USD. Postgraduate (most programs): $62,396 USD. MIT does not differentiate between domestic and international tuition fees.
tuition_raw.raw_snippet: Undergraduate tuition for the 2024–2025 academic year is $62,396.
tuition_raw.notes: Domestic and international students pay the same tuition.

living_raw.value: Estimated monthly living costs in Cambridge, MA: Housing/Rent: $1,400 USD; Food/Meals: $790 USD; Personal/Transport: $260 USD; Books/Supplies: $95 USD. Total: ~$2,545 USD/month.
living_raw.raw_snippet: Housing: $13,224; Meals: $7,506; Books and personal: $2,504 per academic year (9 months).
living_raw.notes: Calculated by dividing 9-month academic year estimates by 9.

scholarships_raw.value: [{'name': 'MIT Scholarship', 'value': 'Full demonstrated need (up to $85,000+)', 'eligibility': 'Need-based; all admitted undergraduate students, including international, are eligible', 'deadline': 'February 15, 2024'}]
scholarships_raw.raw_snippet: The MIT Scholarship is our most common type of aid. It is a need-based grant.

acceptance_raw.value: Undergraduate overall acceptance rate: 4.52% (Class of 2028, admitted 2024).
acceptance_raw.raw_snippet: For the Class of 2028, we admitted 1,275 out of 28,232 applicants (4.52%).

employment_raw.value: 93% of bachelor's degree graduates are employed or in graduate school within 6 months of graduation (2023 Career Outcomes Survey).
employment_raw.raw_snippet: 93% of bachelor’s degree graduates working or in grad school.

salary_raw.value: Median starting salary for bachelor's degree graduates: $126,438 USD overall. Computer Science: $140,000 USD; Mechanical Engineering: $95,000 USD (2023 data).
salary_raw.raw_snippet: The median starting salary for bachelor's degree graduates is $126,438.

visa_raw.value: Visa type: F-1 Student Visa (or J-1). Requirements: Form I-20 or DS-2019, SEVIS fee, financial proof, visa interview. Processing time: Varies by embassy, typically 2-6 weeks after interview.
visa_raw.raw_snippet: Most international students study at MIT on an F-1 visa...

deadlines_raw.value: Fall Undergraduate Intake: Early Action Deadline is November 1. Regular Action Deadline is January 4.
deadlines_raw.raw_snippet: November 1: Early Action deadline. January 4: Regular Action deadline.
